fields.description:
21 pcs PCBA assembly LT66 with new PCB, new analog switch

Transfer #70185568 RND MA1 to MF1 STD
Reference item: #209577
New PCB: #70183934 PCB-RG-L04-A0021 GP LT66 05-5667F
3 pcs PCBA #70185568 will be needed later for evaluation request FGs PTDE-AYG3.

Delivery PCBAs
3 pcs Use for PTDE-AYG3 (Evaluation FGs LT66)
3 pcs Send to Klaus Boelting, RnD Berlin
15 pcs Put on stock MF1 if they passed all tests

fields.summary: DS DDE-4816 PTDE-AVV7 Evaluation request: PCBA assembly LT66 with new PCB, new analog switch; #70185568

comments.body:
[~wneo] 

MF1 STD is created. E5 level 1 released

[~kboelting] 

There are few updated version documents for  01/- , 04- , 07-, 37 - . 

I have replaced new document in Routing,

[~kerng] 

Please create M2 – 

70185568 PCBA S LT66 --> 21ups

[~thhoang]  [~duonguyen] 

FYI

[~abin] [~mbaddah] [~asesuraj] 

Please prepare stencil

PO .8001174704

[~tmoghanan] [~rkrueger] [~deen] [~hayeo] [~sfernandez] [~sbin] [~siti] [~ssenthivel]

Hi [~siti] / [~duonguyen] 

 

M2 is created for PCBA PN, FYI. Thank you.

70185568 PCBA S LT66 --> 21ups

Hi [~wneo] [~kboelting] [~kerng] 

All materials are available. Kindly note for your build schedule.
Stencil will ETA on 4-Mar-2026
Stencil received. PnP program also already available.

Hi [~kboelting], 08-7578E still reflects the old test limits for Test Step #'s 8 and 29.  Please help update to 08-7578F with latest required limits.  Please help release required ECN as well.  

Hi [~wneo] / [~tmoghanan], As mentioned in TechnPrep JIRA container, this will require Test development activities.  It will take some time to prepare the new 908 test program.  Please help park this first until IAT test program already becomes available.  Thanks!

(flag) Flag added

Parked due to test development activities. [~sfernandez] Please update estimated timeline for test development completion

Hi [~tmoghanan] 

To answer your questions:

Delivery PCBAs

3 pcs Use for PTDE-AYG3 (Evaluation FGs LT66) - {color:#4c9aff}*Still valid? Build FG with failed boards?* {color}{color:#00875a}*Klaus: Yes, please build FG with these boards because I expect no negative effect on FG if these 2 test steps will fail.* {color}


3 pcs Send to Klaus Boelting, RnD Berlin - {color:#4c9aff}*This should be fine.*{color}


15 pcs Put on stock MF1 if they passed all tests - {color:#4c9aff}*Wont be able to do this. Should we send them to you as well?*{color}Please advise *{color:#00875a}Klaus: Okay, please send 18 pcs to me.{color}*

[~sfernandez] [~wneo]

Dear [~kerng]

Please proceed for Development Sample Run MO planning of PCBAs shown below
|Item Number|Description|Qty|MO start|MO end|
|#70185568|PCBA S LT66 |21 |13 Mar 26|19 Mar 26|

Please trigger [~mbaddah] for program creation

 

E5:

Released

De-paneling is needed and already in the routing.

Packaging material is not defined and not in BOM. [~abin] Please advise. [~siti] Please update master BOM as well.

 

Delivery: Pass to Thinesh (3 pcs Use for PTDE-AYG3 to Mei Xia, and the resrt to requestor.)

IMR: 0020479469

 

Thank you.

 

FYI: [~rkrueger]  [~asesuraj] [~harrytay] [~deen] [~hayeo] [~sfernandez] [~gteo] [~tnynguyen] [~peckchoo] [~tmoghanan] [~wneo]  [~mzubir]

[~tmoghanan] [~kerng] [~abin] 

PM 035818  Qty 0.0833

Hi [~tmoghanan],

MO is created, please refer to below.

 

Hi [~abin], [~mbaddah],

Kindly help to create LES programme for the below MO, thank you.
|MO no     |Product        |P|St|Ho|St|R|Ref order |Ref ol|     Order qty |Str dt|Fin dt|Name                          |Resp      |
|*{color:#de350b}7003752113{color}*|70185568| |20|40|22| | |1105|21|100326|190326|PCBA S LT66|MP-3459|

[~sfernandez], please review with R&D for IS test limits. Measurement is approximately between 3.6-3.9mA. Subsequent test steps pass.

CC: [~wneo] [~tmoghanan]

[~hayeo] Test results for IS are okay. I will change in test instruction when finished this evaluation and FGs with these PCBas is finished.

Please go on with testing.

[~sfernandez] [~wneo] [~tmoghanan]

Hi [~kboelting],

We have completed testing MO #7003752113.  Per latest correspondence, despite expected test failures, we proceeded with 
testing the MO using the same 908 via commenting out the portion of the current test program source code that caused 
it to break when test failure is encountered.  
 !SkipBreakCondition.png|thumbnail! 

Some DUTs can pass the IS test.  Please note that aside from Test Step #'s 8 and 29, there are also other test failures 
(e.g., Test Step #'s 13 to 17, 19. 21, 23, and 29 to 36).

Attached is the logfile containing the test complete results.  [^908-1915_F0000701855687003752113A_26Mar26.DAT] 

Regards,
Sammy R. F.

Hi [~sfernandez] 

The test results in data tracer are very strange. We never had these failures before.

Please check following needed connections to PCBA:
 * Transmitter LED must be connected
 * Input signal must be connected
 * Display LED (green and yellow) must be connected

[~hayeo] [~tmoghanan] [~wneo]
[~hayeo] able to find the issue root cause and will be able to close testing topic by Monday.

IE TE already provide latest test result to R&D (c/o Boelting Klaus).   We are currently awaiting response on the following items: 
1. If based on provided latest test results, we can send the boards to the R&D side, and close the current MO already.
2. If the Lower test limit of Test Step #29 (Vb-pulse test) can be relaxed to accommodate some, if not all, observed marginal test 
   failures.

[~sfernandez] 

Data Tracer values are okay except test step 29 (Vb pulse test), but this does not matter for building up the FGs evaluation.

Later I will change value for test step 29 in test instruction via ECN.
 * Please close the current MO for these PCBA.
 * 3 pcs PCBA are needed to build up FGs LT66 #268885; NPIOTHER-3978
 * 18 pcs PCBA send to me.

[~tmoghanan] [~mlau]

* 3 pcs PCBA passed to [~mlau] (on her table)
 * 18 pcs Shipped under TO: 147298

PE Comment:

No issue from PE side.
No NG and False Call detected at AOI.
